figures.caption: Figure 1. Visualization of long-tailed distribution in nuScenes [3] (top), illustration of inter-intra categories diversity challenges in tail-classes (middle), and representative failure cases of baseline model caused by such inter class ambiguities (bottom-1st) and intra-class diversity (bottom - 2nd).

Table 3. Long-tail break down mAP evaluation on validation split on nuScenes [3]. L denotes LiDAR. C denotes Camera. † shows the result take from FOMO-3D [54]. ∗ shows method using ViT backbone [10]. Methods shown in grey utilize multi-sensor inputs.
Table 1. Performance comparison on validation split of nuScenes [3] with 18 categories. The best score is in bold.
Figure 5. Performance comparison under different corner cases.

Figure 6. Quanlitative result on inter-intra diversity cases (Debris and Police Officer), compare between our method and baseline [46] on tail-class. Left: our basline, Right: our proposed SemLT3D. The orange dashed box highlight failure cases caused by intra-class diversity, while the red dashed box indicate failure cases arising from inter-class ambiguity.
Figure 2. Overall architecture of the proposed SemLT3D for multi-view 3D long-tailed object detection.
